messages.content: Hi please write a job description for my career in decathlon sports India of 7 years. Starting from 2 years in customer service, 3 years zone operation maintenance manager taking care of retail operation procedure controlling retail shrinkage and managing multiple vendors for the maintenance for 20 stores in the span of 3 years visiting store to audit the stores and training staff on the same. 2 years as Operation manager with managing top department (quechua)with 40% contribution sales towards the store, with additional role of hiring grooming teammates along with managing b2b sales for the same period. Giving department highest growth in the city to upto 60%.

Job Description: Decathlon Sports India - Operations Manager

Position Summary:
We are seeking an experienced and dedicated individual for the position of Operations Manager at Decathlon Sports India. The successful candidate will be responsible for overseeing retail operations, managing vendor relationships, controlling shrinkage, auditing stores, training staff, managing sales for a specific department (Quechua), and driving overall growth.

Responsibilities:

1. Customer Service (2 years):
- Provide exceptional customer service by addressing inquiries, resolving complaints, and ensuring overall customer satisfaction.
- Assist customers in finding products and provide advice on their selection.
- Maintain high standards of visual merchandising and store presentation.

2. Zone Operation Maintenance Manager (3 years):
- Develop and implement retail operation procedures across 20 stores in the assigned zone.
- Control and reduce retail shrinkage by implementing effective loss prevention strategies.
- Manage relationships with multiple vendors for store maintenance.
- Regularly visit stores to conduct audits, ensuring adherence to operational standards.
- Train store staff on audit procedures and address any non-compliance issues.

3. Operation Manager (2 years):
- Manage the top department, Quechua, and drive sales growth.
- Collaborate with the buying team to ensure optimum stock levels and assortment.
- Develop and execute sales strategies to achieve sales targets.
- Hire and train high-performing teammates, ensuring they adhere to grooming standards.
- Cultivate B2B sales relationships and explore opportunities for growth within the segment.
- Achieve department sales growth of up to 60% within the city.

Qualifications:

- Bachelor's degree in Business Administration or relevant field.
- Minimum 7 years of progressive experience in retail operations and customer service.
- Proven track record of managing a team and driving sales growth.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
- Ability to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines.
- Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

We offer a competitive salary package and opportunities for career growth within the organization.

If you meet the above qualifications and are passionate about sports retail operations, we encourage you to apply. Please submit your resume and a cover letter detailing your relevant experience.

please write a small discription of my career to update in my online job profile for my career in decathlon sports India of 7 years. Starting from 2 years in customer service, 3 years zone operation maintenance manager taking care of retail operation procedure controlling retail shrinkage and managing multiple vendors for the maintenance for 20 stores in the span of 3 years visiting store to audit the stores and training staff on the same. 2 years as Operation manager with managing top department (quechua)with 40% contribution sales towards the store, with additional role of hiring grooming teammates along with managing b2b sales for the same period. Giving department highest growth in the city to upto 60%.

I am an experienced professional with a successful career spanning 7 years in the retail industry, specifically in Decathlon Sports India. I have a strong background in customer service, having spent 2 years delivering exceptional service and ensuring customer satisfaction.

In my role as a Zone Operation Maintenance Manager, I was responsible for overseeing retail operations and implementing procedures across 20 stores. I effectively controlled retail shrinkage and managed relationships with multiple vendors for store maintenance. Additionally, I conducted store audits and provided staff training to ensure compliance with operational standards.

For 2 years, I served as an Operation Manager, specifically managing the top department, Quechua. I achieved significant sales growth for the store, with the department contributing 40% of the overall sales. In this position, I also played a key role in hiring and grooming teammates to maintain high standards of professionalism and customer service. Furthermore, I successfully managed B2B sales and drove department growth in the city to an impressive 60%.

My career in Decathlon Sports India has equipped me with strong analytical skills, problem-solving abilities, and excellent communication and interpersonal skills. I thrive in fast-paced environments, consistently meeting deadlines and prioritizing tasks effectively.

I am now seeking new opportunities to leverage my skills and experiences in the retail industry. If you are looking for a dedicated and motivated professional to drive operational efficiency, sales growth, and customer satisfaction, I would welcome the chance to contribute to your organization.

Write my experiences for the job resume: To open the first Decathlon store in the country with complete new employee to train them on the core competencies. Did market research to get the ensure the right sports were introduced in the market. Did collaborations with local sports club to mark the arrival of the worlds largest sports retailer. Involved the marketing strategy along with the marketing team. Managed the stock supply to create good stock pile we have optimum level of stock considering the lead time of 3-4 months. Added local suppliers to the shop like Everlast, adidas , speedo, babolat, coega, new era etc by negotiating contracts for margin percentage, incoterms, and payment terms to complete the range offered to our customers and improve the profitability of the brand in the group o companiesour customers

Professional Experiences:

1. Opening the First Decathlon Store:
- Played a pivotal role in opening the first Decathlon store in the country.
- Successfully trained a complete team of new employees on the core competencies of the Decathlon brand.
- Conducted thorough market research to ensure the introduction of the right sports and products in the local market.
- Collaborated with local sports clubs to create awareness and excitement around the arrival of the world's largest sports retailer.

2. Strategic Marketing Involvement:
- Worked closely with the marketing team to develop and implement effective marketing strategies.
- Contributed to the development of marketing campaigns to promote the brand and attract customers.
- Helped create a strong brand presence in the local market and establish Decathlon as a preferred choice for sports enthusiasts.

3. Stock Management and Supplier Collaborations:
- Managed stock supply to ensure an optimal level of inventory and create a good stockpile for customer demand.
- Conducted thorough analysis and considered lead times of 3-4 months to maintain a well-managed stock position.
- Negotiated contracts with local suppliers including Everlast, Adidas, Speedo, Babolat, Coega, New Era, etc.
- Successfully established supplier collaborations and negotiated terms such as margin percentage, incoterms, and payment terms to enhance the product range and improve profitability for the brand.

4. Range Expansion and Profitability Enhancement:
- Added new local suppliers and expanded the product range to cater to diverse customer needs.
- Through strategic negotiations and contract management, improved profitability for the brand within the company group.
- Ensured a wider variety of options for customers, leading to increased sales and customer satisfaction.

In summary, my experiences in opening the first Decathlon store, leading training efforts, conducting market research, collaborating with local sports clubs, contributing to marketing strategies, managing stock supply, and enhancing profitability through supplier collaborations have equipped me with a comprehensive skill set in retail operations, marketing, and strategic planning. I am confident that my abilities and achievements will make a significant impact in driving success for future endeavors.
Write a profile summary analysis above results

Profile Summary Analysis:

With over 7 years of progressive experience in the retail industry, specifically within Decathlon Sports India, I have consistently delivered exceptional results while leading various key initiatives. From opening the first Decathlon store in the country to managing stock supply and enhancing profitability through supplier collaborations, my profile showcases a strong track record of success.

As the primary driver behind the opening of the first Decathlon store, I successfully trained a complete team of new employees on the core competencies of the brand. This not only set the foundation for the store's success but also facilitated the introduction of Decathlon in the local market.

Additionally, my proficiency in conducting market research proved instrumental in ensuring the right sports and products were introduced to meet customer needs and preferences. By collaborating with local sports clubs, I effectively generated excitement and awareness surrounding the arrival of Decathlon as a renowned sports retailer.

Playing an active role in marketing strategies, I contributed to creating strong brand awareness and positioning within the local market. This resulted in increased customer attraction and retention, firmly establishing Decathlon as the preferred choice for sports enthusiasts.

With a keen focus on optimizing stock management, I successfully maintained an optimal level of inventory, considering lead times of 3-4 months. Through effective negotiations and contract management, I strategically added local suppliers such as Everlast, Adidas, Speedo, Babolat, Coega, and New Era, thereby expanding the product range and enhancing profitability for the brand.

Overall, my profile showcases a proven ability to drive successful retail operations, marketing strategies, and supplier collaborations. Combining a comprehensive skill set in leadership, strategic planning, and analytical thinking, I am poised to make significant contributions to any future role in the retail industry.
Write a profile summary for job portal with above reference. Where I worked 7 years in decathlon India and 1 year decathlon Bahrain to open first store of the country.

Profile Summary:

Results-driven retail professional with a successful track record of 7 years at Decathlon Sports India, followed by 1 year at Decathlon Bahrain. Experience encompasses a diverse range of responsibilities, including opening the first Decathlon store in both countries, training new employees, conducting market research, and driving profitable growth.

Skilled in leading and motivating teams, I successfully trained and developed a complete team of new employees, ensuring their proficiency in Decathlon's core competencies. By leveraging market research insights, I effectively introduced the right sports and products to cater to customer preferences, resulting in increased sales and customer satisfaction.

Known for collaborative partnerships, I established strong relationships with local sports clubs to generate excitement and awareness during the launch of the first Decathlon store in both India and Bahrain. Additionally, I played a key role in shaping marketing strategies to create a strong brand presence and drive customer attraction.

Adept in stock management, I consistently maintained optimal inventory levels by analyzing lead times and implementing effective stock supply strategies. Through strategic negotiations and contract management, I successfully diversified the supplier base, expanding the product range and enhancing profitability for the brand.

Having achieved outstanding results throughout my career, I possess a proven ability to drive retail operations, strategic planning, and team development. With a demonstrated passion for the sports retail industry, I am now seeking new opportunities to leverage my skills and contribute to the growth and success of a dynamic organization.

In summary, my multi-faceted experience in opening Decathlon's inaugural stores in India and Bahrain, training teams, conducting market research, and successfully implementing growth strategies positions me as a highly valuable asset for any retail organization seeking a results-oriented and strategic leader.
